name: T001
description: Create project structure: `build.zig`, `build.zig.zon`, directory tree (`src/domain/`, `src/application/`, `src/infrastructure/persistence/`, `src/infrastructure/protocol/`, `src/interfaces/`), stub `src/main.zig`

name: T002
description: Implement Job entity and JobStatus enum in `src/domain/job.zig` with co-located tests (set/get, get_to_execute time filtering, sequential modifications — port 3 Rust tests)

name: T003
description: Implement Rule type in `src/domain/rule.zig` with co-located tests (supports() pattern matching with weight, non-matching patterns)

name: T004
description: Implement Runner tagged union in `src/domain/runner.zig`, Instruction enum in `src/domain/instruction.zig`, Query request/response in `src/domain/query.zig`, Execution request/response in `src/domain/execution.zig`, barrel file `src/domain.zig`

name: T005
description: Implement binary encoder/decoder in `src/infrastructure/persistence/encoder.zig` with co-located tests (encode/decode round-trip for Job and Rule, all Runner variants, invalid data errors — port 2 Rust tests byte-for-byte)

name: T006
description: Implement logfile entry parser in `src/infrastructure/persistence/logfile.zig` with co-located tests (4-byte length-prefixed entries, incomplete buffers, max size errors — port 2 Rust tests) + barrel `src/infrastructure/persistence.zig`

name: T007
description: Implement KCP protocol streaming parser in `src/infrastructure/protocol/parser.zig` with co-located tests (simple/quoted strings, backslash escaping, incomplete/invalid buffers — port 13 assertions from Rust) + barrel `src/infrastructure/protocol.zig`

name: T008
description: Implement JobStorage (HashMap + sorted Vec) in `src/application/job_storage.zig` with co-located tests (CRUD, status filtering, ordered insertion by execution time)

name: T009
description: Implement RuleStorage in `src/application/rule_storage.zig` with co-located tests (CRUD, pattern-based pairing with priority/weight)

name: T010
description: Implement QueryHandler in `src/application/query_handler.zig` with co-located tests (process Instructions into Query responses using JobStorage + RuleStorage)

name: T011
description: Implement ExecutionClient (UUID-based tracking) in `src/application/execution_client.zig`

name: T012
description: Implement Scheduler (Database tick loop service) in `src/application/scheduler.zig` + barrel `src/application.zig`

name: T013
description: Implement Channel (bounded, Mutex+Condition) in `src/infrastructure/channel.zig` and framerate Clock in `src/infrastructure/clock.zig` with co-located tests

name: T014
description: Implement Shell runner (subprocess execution) in `src/infrastructure/shell_runner.zig` and TCP server (Controller adapter) in `src/infrastructure/tcp_server.zig`

name: T015
description: Implement background compression in `src/infrastructure/persistence/background.zig` + barrel `src/infrastructure.zig`

name: T016
description: Implement minimal TOML config parser in `src/interfaces/config.zig` with co-located tests (3 sections: log.level, controller.listen, database.fsync_on_persist, database.framerate — defaults + validation)

name: T017
description: Implement CLI entry point in `src/interfaces/cli.zig` (-c/--config arg parsing) + barrel `src/interfaces.zig`

name: T018
description: Wire main.zig: spawn Controller, Database, Processor threads with Channel-based message routing in `src/main.zig`

name: T019
description: Finalize `build.zig` with all module paths, test steps per layer (`zig build test` runs all co-located tests), and ReleaseSafe optimization option

name: T020
description: Fix Clock.start: implement framerate loop with sleep, call callback repeatedly instead of once

name: T021
description: Fix TcpServer.start: implement accept loop, parse KCP frames, route requests/responses via channels. Remove premature deinit. Fix broken test

name: T022
description: Fix runDatabase in main.zig: implement tick loop using Clock, drain exec_response_ch, poll request_ch, send responses to response_ch

name: T023
description: Fix ExecutionClient.pull_results: read actual execution responses, match by identifier, report real success/failure

name: T024
description: Fix background.zig: add deinit method, accept allocator parameter in execute, remove unused Status.lost variant

name: T025
description: Fix parser.zig: return ParseResult with empty args slice for zero-argument KCP commands

name: T026
description: Fix config.zig: add errdefer to free controller_listen allocation on subsequent parse error

name: T027
description: Cleanup: remove dead Storage struct from domain/job.zig, rename parseArgs to parse_args in cli.zig, remove redundant tests from runner.zig

name: T028
description: Implement TcpServer.start accept loop: accept connections, parse KCP frames via protocol/parser.zig, route query.Request/Response via channels. Remove premature deinit and discarded channels. Fix test

name: T029
description: Fix main.zig daemon lifecycle: join all 3 thread handles, block main() until threads exit, ensure defer deinit on channels only after threads stop. Use testing.allocator in unit tests

name: T030
description: Fix tick loop: move triggered-drain so pull_results can match responses. Add Channel(T).tryReceive() method, remove abstraction-breaking tryReceive helper from main.zig

name: T031
description: Fix background.zig compress() safety: accept dir path param, use Dir handle instead of cwd(), atomic rename pattern, named constants, fix tests with defer deinit + testing.allocator

name: T032
description: Wire persistence into Scheduler: import persistence modules, add load(path) for startup logfile restore, add logfile append in handle_query for accepted instructions

name: T033
description: Add 3 co-located test blocks to domain/job.zig: field access, JobStatus enum values, status byte mapping (port from Rust tests)

name: T034
description: Merge Encodable and Decoded into single Entry type in encoder.zig, update encode/decode signatures and all callers

name: T035
description: Normalize all private function names to snake_case: parser.zig (parseToken, parseSimpleString, parseQuotedString), encoder.zig (encodeJob, encodeRule), main.zig (runController, tryReceive, runDatabase, runProcessor)

name: T036
description: Remove unnecessary comments from functional_tests.zig: file header block and section divider comments

name: T037
description: Fix config.zig errdefer: free controller_listen allocation on subsequent parse error to prevent memory leak

name: T038
description: Wire persistence into Scheduler: add load(allocator, path) method to read logfile and restore state into JobStorage/RuleStorage, add logfile append in handle_query for SET/RULE_SET instructions, add co-located round-trip test

name: T039
description: Add direct unit tests for Channel(T).try_receive() in channel.zig: returns null on empty, returns value after send, non-blocking behavior

name: T040
description: Fix TcpServer.start: implement real accept loop — accept connections, parse KCP via protocol/parser.zig, route query.Request/Response via channels. Remove discarded _ = channel params

name: T041
description: Call scheduler.load() from run_database() in main.zig: restore persisted state on startup. Pass logfile_path from config through DatabaseContext

name: T042
description: Fix iterator invalidation in Scheduler.tick(): copy borrowed slice from get_to_execute() into owned allocation before mutation loop to prevent orderedRemove corruption

name: T043
description: Fix append_to_logfile() file creation: replace openFile(.write_only) with openFile + fallback createFile so first write on fresh install succeeds

name: T044
description: Fix handle_query error propagation in main.zig: capture error result, send Response with actual success/failure instead of hardcoded true. Remove catch {} swallow

name: T045
description: Fix Channel.send() deadlock on close: add self.closed check in while loop condition, return error/sentinel when closed to unblock producers

name: T046
description: Fix daemon shutdown hang: close exec_request_ch before processor_thread.join(), replace manual sequential deinit with defer in reverse acquisition order

name: T047
description: Fix background.zig: add allocator param to Process.execute() instead of hardcoded page_allocator, add deinit method, pass configurable filenames to compress()

name: T048
description: Fix parser.zig: return ParseResult with empty args for zero-argument KCP commands instead of ParseError.Invalid. Add co-located test

name: T049
description: Fix scheduler.zig: accept std.fs.Dir param in load() and append_to_logfile() instead of std.fs.cwd(). Update call sites in run_database

name: T050
description: Wire database_fsync_on_persist into logfile flush path in append_to_logfile, or remove from Config and parser if unused

name: T051
description: Rename Args.parse_args to Args.parse_slice in cli.zig for naming consistency. Update 5 test call sites

name: T052
description: Remove unnecessary errdefer guards in decode_inner in encoder.zig that guard allocations immediately followed by return with no fallible operation

name: T053
description: Fix TcpServer.start: implement real accept loop — accept connections, parse KCP via protocol/parser.zig, route query.Request/Response via channels. Remove discarded channel params and premature server.deinit()

name: T054
description: Fix daemon shutdown: set running to false after controller_thread.join(), close query_request_ch, ensure exec_request_ch.close() before processor_thread.join(). Move defer deinit after joins

name: T055
description: Fix drain_pending double execution: track sent items and clear only sent prefix on ChannelClosed. Add isolated unit test for partial drain

name: T056
description: Fix Scheduler.load() arena leak: deinit existing load_arena before overwriting. Add test for double load()

name: T057
description: Fix handle_query discarded Response: propagate Response to caller or change QueryHandler.handle() to return void

name: T058
description: Abstract persistence behind application-level port so scheduler no longer imports infrastructure/persistence directly. Restore hexagonal layering

name: T059
description: Fix std.fs.cwd() in run_database: open Dir in main() before spawning threads, pass through DatabaseContext

name: T060
description: Document logfile_dir ownership contract in scheduler.zig or eliminate dangling handle risk

name: T061
description: Remove unused allocator parameter from Args.parse_slice in cli.zig and update call site

name: T062
description: Merge duplicated layer_tests loops in build.zig into single iteration

name: T063
description: Replace @constCast in functional_tests.zig with allocator.dupe to match codebase ownership pattern

name: T064
description: Move default_filenames constant inside test blocks in background.zig — only used in tests but declared at module scope

name: T065
description: Remove // Feature: C001 comment from functional_tests.zig line 1
